tasks.name: MVP-SF-001
tasks.title: Project Scaffolding
tasks.description: flutter create sharedfarms; pubspec.yaml with flutter_riverpod, go_router, http, hive_flutter, firebase_messaging, connectivity_plus; analysis_options.yaml with flutter_lints; folder structure: lib/core/, lib/features/, lib/models/, lib/shared/; core/network/api_client.dart — single HTTP client, no raw http.get in widget code; core/config/config.dart; core/errors/errors.dart; initial commit on feature/SF-001_scaffolding

tasks.name: MVP-SF-002
tasks.title: Auth — Registration and Login
tasks.description: features/auth/ — registration screen (name, phone/email, password), login screen, AuthNotifier (Riverpod AsyncNotifier), ApiClient.register + ApiClient.login; JWT token stored in secure storage; GoRouter redirect guard (/login if unauthenticated); farm profile creation on first login (farm name, location, size, primary crops grown); support for multiple farms per user

tasks.name: MVP-SF-003
tasks.title: Farm Dashboard
tasks.description: features/dashboard/ — home screen after login; active crops summary (name, stage, days since planting); upcoming tasks due within 7 days; weather widget (temperature and rain forecast via third-party only — no custom forecasting); shortcut to nearby shared resources; DashboardNotifier; pull-to-refresh; stale data shown during refresh; overdue tasks highlighted

tasks.name: MVP-SF-004
tasks.title: Crop Tracking
tasks.description: features/crops/ — create crop entry (type, variety, plot/area, planting date); log milestones (germination, flowering, pest/disease, irrigation, fertilisation); record harvest (date, quantity, unit: kg/bags/tonnes); chronological crop history per entry; statuses: active, harvested, failed; CropNotifier; table-driven widget and provider tests

tasks.name: MVP-SF-005
tasks.title: Shared Resource Management
tasks.description: features/resources/ — list owned resource (name, category: tractor/pump/storage/etc., availability window, fee notes); browse nearby resources filtered by category; send / accept / decline resource requests with date range; active loans view (borrower, duration, return status); mark loan as returned to close cycle; ResourceNotifier (AsyncNotifier)

tasks.name: MVP-SF-006
tasks.title: Task Scheduling
tasks.description: features/tasks/ — create task (title, description, assignee, due date, priority: low/medium/high); statuses: pending, in_progress, completed, cancelled; validate status transitions; 24-hour local push notification reminder via flutter_local_notifications; overdue task highlighting surfaced to dashboard; TaskNotifier

tasks.name: MVP-SF-007
tasks.title: Marketplace
tasks.description: features/marketplace/ — create produce listing (crop type, quantity, unit, asking price, location, available-from date); browse all listings filtered by crop type and distance; express buyer interest; seller confirms buyer; statuses: active, sold, archived; client-side auto-archive filter past available-from date; MarketplaceNotifier

tasks.name: MVP-SF-008
tasks.title: Community Feed
tasks.description: features/feed/ — post text update, photo, or tip scoped to region or platform-wide; like and comment on posts; delete own posts and comments; FeedNotifier; paginated list with infinite scroll; image picker for photo posts; empty and error states

tasks.name: MVP-SF-009
tasks.title: Notifications
tasks.description: core/notifications/ — FCM push integration (Android v1; iOS deferred); in-app notification centre with read/unread state; per-type preference settings; push event types: resource request received/accepted/declined, task due reminder (24 h before), marketplace interest received on listing, new comment on farmer's post; NotificationNotifier

tasks.name: MVP-SF-010
tasks.title: Offline Support
tasks.description: Hive/Isar local cache for dashboard, crops, tasks, and resource listings; offline banner widget when connectivity unavailable (connectivity_plus); write queue: mutations recorded locally and synced on reconnect; OfflineSyncService runs in background on reconnect; all providers fall back to cached data gracefully; offline banner dismissed automatically on reconnect

tasks.name: MVP-SF-011
tasks.title: Polish and Testing
tasks.description: Table-driven unit tests for all Notifier classes with mocked ApiClient; widget tests for key screens (auth, dashboard, crop list, task list); flutter analyze 0 issues; dart format applied before every commit; loading skeletons and error/empty states on all screens; accessibility labels on all interactive widgets; GoRouter deep-link smoke tests
